scripts.dev:all: nx run-many -t dev -p backend frontend status-page --parallel
scripts.build: nx run-many -t build -p backend frontend status-page logging-sdk
scripts.build:all: pnpm run build && pnpm run build:daemon
scripts.build:daemon: scripts/sync-update-trust-anchor.sh && make -C packages/daemons/nginx build && make -C packages/daemons/docker build && mkdir -p packages/daemons/monitoring/bin && cd packages/daemons/monitoring && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o bin/monitoring-daemon ./cmd/monitoring-daemon
scripts.test: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm --filter frontend test && pnpm run test:logging-sdk && pnpm run test:daemon
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter frontend lint && pnpm --filter backend lint && pnpm --filter @wiolett/gateway-logger lint && pnpm run lint:daemon
